title: freirea micrantha
intro: Freirea micrantha, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Freirea micrantha has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts and essential oils have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Freirea micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of herbal preparations.
